summary.text: The cellular phone works well and is in excellent condition, appearing like brand new. The battery performs excellently with 100% capacity and zero battery cycles. The device shows no signs of wear or damage, with no tiny scratches on the surface. Customers appreciate the phone's appearance and screen size, though opinions vary regarding the charging cable.

authors_reviews.title: Great quality and battery life
authors_reviews.text: Can’t believe this is a refurbished phone. Looks great; no scratches whatsoever. Also 100% battery. Very happy with the purchase!
authors_reviews.author: Bruno

authors_reviews.text: I was scared to order at first but I took the risk and I’m so glad I did.. the phone is perfect and battery’s health was 100%.. we’ve had it for a few weeks now and no issues so far.. the screen came with 2 lil scratches but you can’t tell once you put a screen protector on it.. few dings in the back but overall I’d recommend this seller 10/10.. my daughter loves her new phone and I saved sooo much money buying renewed
authors_reviews.author: ~Justice~

authors_reviews.title: Excellent shape.
authors_reviews.text: iPhone was in excellent shape. Only just got it. Everything seems to be working fine. Thanks
authors_reviews.author: Chris

authors_reviews.text: The iPhone 16E comes with excellent conditions and works very well. I love it !. The battery is excellent with 100%.

authors_reviews.title: Review
authors_reviews.text: Phone it’s fine but it was slightly dirty and packaged poorly. I wouldn’t call that “excellent” condition but it’s functional
authors_reviews.author: Amazon Customer

authors_reviews.title: Unbelieveable deal.
authors_reviews.text: I can't believe the phone I got. The phone was basically brand new, with 1, yes 1 charge cycle on the battery. Battery health is 100%. First Usage date was October 2nd. Warranty good till October 2026, eligible for Apple Care also. There are zero marks on the phone. There weren't even any fingerprints on the screen or the case.Have yet to test every other aspect of the phone, but this was insane. It's essentially a new phone for $650. I will update if things change.Extremely happy!
authors_reviews.author: Kuno

authors_reviews.text: Phone was in perfect condition with 100% battery life.
